creator: thierry@thomas.as
text:
There was an inversion between php3 and php4, and that may cause the port
to try to install mod_php4 twice. [Thanks to Bill Fenner]

Fix: Apply the following patch to /usr/ports/www/horde/Makefile:
How-To-Repeat: 	See Bento's report at <URL:http://bento.freebsd.org/errorlogs/errorlogs/e.4.2001090214/horde-1.2.6.log>.
